# Summary

Current Codex plugin overview and install workflow.

# Key facts

- Codex exposes plugin browsing and installation in the app and in the CLI via `/plugins`.
- Plugins bundle reusable skills, app integrations, and MCP servers.
- Installed plugins can be disabled in `~/.codex/config.toml`.

# Refresh notes

- Pair this page with `build-plugins.md` for local marketplace and package-structure details.
